Video.summary: Clouds and sea roll in toward land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Seascape Fantasy

Video.summary: Bob paints snow-covered mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Peaks

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Southwest Serenity

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest on partially black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Enchanted Forest

Video.summary: Bob paints a peaceful autumn path.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Exhibition

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry scene on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Seclusion

Video.summary: Bob's landscape fades into infinity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Half Oval Vignette

Video.summary: Bob paints within a double oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Oval Stream

Video.summary: Branches bend over a misty stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Morning Mist

Video.summary: Gold, lavender and crimson surround a quiet brook.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Crimson Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a colorful landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splashes of Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a forlorn forest cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowbound Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints a soft winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Lace

Video.summary: Brilliant foliage surrounds a quiet pond.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Absolutely Autumn

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oriental Falls

Video.summary: A playful brook complements a range of rugged mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Mountain Brook

Video.summary: Bob paints a thawing landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Not Quite Spring

Video.summary: A wilderness path leads to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob accents with an abundance of trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterside Way

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross uses a lot of color in a depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a southern scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cypress Swamp

Video.summary: Bob's use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to a woodside setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hunter's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Footbridge

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Enchanted Falls Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a remote fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hideaway Cove

Video.summary: Bob highlights a snowy scene with blue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lonely Retreat

Video.summary: With guest artist Steve Ross.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Summer in the Mountains

Video.summary: Bob paints an orange sun over a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Warm Winter Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a path in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Palette

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Mountains overlook a peaceful autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Woods

Video.summary: Painting a golden sunset on a black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Sunset

Video.summary: Bob Ross' son Steve demonstrates painting within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints detailed trees in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Solitude

Video.summary: Painting the sun as it sets over a deserted beach.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm sun high in the sky to offset the cold mountainscape below.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Frost

Video.summary: Bob creates an effect using masking tape on the canvas as he paints the sky and mountains as a backdrop for a meadow, trees and a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Triple View

Video.summary: Bob paints a woodland scene complete with a small footbridge running across a creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Bridge

Video.summary: Bob Ross paints a forest landscape, featuring a stream, rock formations and trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twin Falls

Video.summary: Creating a seascape using a half black, half white canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Breeze
